title: oenothera claviformis subsp. lancifolia
intro: Oenothera claviformis subsp. lancifolia, also known as the lance-leaf evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the willow-herb family that is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera claviformis subsp. lancifolia include reducing inflammation, improving skin and hair health, and supporting cardiovascular health, among others. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health issues.
